task_completion.description: Navigate to the target order in the Drupal Commerce admin interface.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot shows the Drupal Commerce Orders list with Order #1 visible, or the specific view/edit page for Order #1.

task_completion.description: Modify the customer associated with Order #1.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot shows the edit form for Order #1 with the 'Customer' or 'Authored by' field being changed from 'sarah.old' to 'sarah.jenkins'.
Screenshot shows a success message indicating the order has been updated, or the Order #1 details page explicitly listing 'sarah.jenkins' as the customer.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the old user account settings.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot shows the Drupal 'People' (users) list with 'sarah.old' visible, or the specific edit profile page for the 'sarah.old' account.

task_completion.description: Change the status of the old account to blocked.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot shows the edit form for the 'sarah.old' account with the 'Status' radio button explicitly set to 'Blocked'.

task_completion.description: Successfully save the blocked status for the old account.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot shows a success message indicating the user account has been updated, or the user list showing the status of 'sarah.old' as 'Blocked'.

integrity.description: The agent must use the Drupal web interface to complete the task, not terminal commands.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with a web browser (Drupal admin UI). There should be no terminal windows executing 'drush' commands to update the order or block the user.

integrity.description: The agent must block the account without deleting it, as explicitly requested.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should not show the agent clicking 'Cancel account', 'Delete', or confirming the deletion of the 'sarah.old' user profile.

integrity.description: The agent must interact with the actual application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a real web browser navigating the Drupal site, not a text editor modifying database files or mocked HTML pages.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The old account username is 'sarah.old'. The new account username is 'sarah.jenkins'. The target order to be reassigned is Order #1. The environment is Drupal Commerce.
